svg.title: SRT-4 ALU architecture diagram
svg.desc: Structural hierarchy of a Booth/SRT-4 ALU built from primitive components, showing layers from gates up to the top-level ALU.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the gates.sv module in more detail')
sendPrompt('How should I implement csa.sv for SRT-4 division?')
sendPrompt('How should I implement shifter.sv for the ALU?')
sendPrompt('How does the SRT-4 quotient digit selection LUT work?')
sendPrompt('Explain how booth.sv works as the multiply unit')
sendPrompt('Explain cu_booth.sv as the MUL control unit')
sendPrompt('How should I implement the add/sub unit for the ALU?')
sendPrompt('How should I implement the SRT-4 divider datapath?')
sendPrompt('How should I implement the SRT-4 control FSM?')
sendPrompt('How should I implement logic unit (AND/OR/XOR/NOT) for the ALU?')
sendPrompt('How should I design the alu_top.sv module interface?')
sendPrompt('How should I design the master ALU control FSM cu_alu.sv?')
